<script>
document.querySelectorAll('.card-montadoras').forEach(function(card) {
    card.addEventListener('click', function() {

        window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];

        dataLayer.push({
            event: 'click',
            page_location: window.location.href,
            element_name: this.dataset.id,
            element_group: 'ver_mais'
        });

    });
});
</script>

<script> 
  (function() {
  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');

    if (!forms.length) return;

    forms.forEach(function(form) {
      var formStarted = false;

      form.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
        if (formStarted) return;

        var field = e.target;

        if (
          field.matches('input[type="text"], input[type="email"], input[type="tel"], textarea') &&
          field.value &&
          field.value.trim() !== ''
        ) {
          formStarted = true;

          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push({
            event: 'form_start',
            page_location: window.location.href,
            form_id: form.id || '',
            form_name: form.getAttribute('name') || '',
            form_destination: form.action || ''
          });
        }
      });

      form.addEventListener('change', function(e) {
        if (formStarted) return;

        var el = e.target;

        if (el.type === 'checkbox' && el.checked) {
          formStarted = true;

          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push({
            event: 'form_start',
            page_location: window.location.href,
            form_id: form.id || '',
            form_name: form.getAttribute('name') || '',
            form_destination: form.action || ''
          });
        }
      });
    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
  (function() {

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');

    if (!forms.length) return;

    forms.forEach(function(form) {

      form.addEventListener('submit', function(e) {

        var submitButton =
          e.submitter ||
          document.activeElement ||
          form.querySelector('button[type="submit"], input[type="submit"]');

        var submitText = '';

        if (submitButton) {
          submitText =
            (submitButton.innerText || submitButton.value || '').trim();
        }

        window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
        window.dataLayer.push({
          event: 'form_submit',
          page_location: window.location.href,
          form_id: form.id || '',
          form_name: form.getAttribute('name') || '',
          form_destination: form.action || '',
          form_submit_text: submitText
        });

      });

    });
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }

})();
</script>

tag.name: Atribuição de ID e Nome para o form

parameter.value:
<script>
(function() {

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll('form');

    forms.forEach(function(form, index) {

      // Só define se não existir (evita sobrescrever algo real)
      if (!form.id) {
        form.id = 'form_' + index;
      }

      if (!form.getAttribute('name')) {
        form.setAttribute('name', 'form_contato_' + index);
      }

      // bônus (recomendado para tracking moderno)
      form.setAttribute('data-gtm-form-index', index);
      form.setAttribute('data-gtm-form', 'tracked');

    });

  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', init);
  } else {
    init();
  }

})();
</script>
